## Checklist

- [ ] `cd memory-core && npm run typecheck && npm test`
- [ ] `cd examples && npm install && npm start` (if examples touched)
- [ ] `npm run lint` from repo root (if JS/TS touched)
- [ ] No production DIDs, internal paths, or hive-specific identifiers introduced
- [ ] Open/closed line respected ([`memory-core/README.md`](memory-core/README.md))
- [ ] Spec changes include Appendix C changelog entry + correct version bump (if applicable)
- [ ] **Draft status preserved** — no "Stable" or "production-ready" claims added
